probes.name: multi_tool_mishmash_no_agent
probes.prompt: Hey Twily, can you take my last 10 telegram voice messages, transcribe them, translate to English, find the most important topics, and then post a summary to my Notion workspace? Also send me the link here when done.
probes.criteria:
Agent role: fallback 'build' agent that handles unroutable requests by reporting the routing failure and sending a friendly Twily apology. A GOOD response acknowledges it cannot fulfill the request because no suitable agent/workflow is available, clearly states what it cannot do (transcribe voice, translate, post to Notion), and delivers a warm, friendly apology in Twily's voice without attempting any of the requested actions.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages #1 and #16 — complex multi-step requests combining tools (transcription, translation, email/notion) that no single compiled agent covers.

probes.name: polish_real_estate_inquiry
probes.prompt: Mam pytanie — czy możesz sprawdzić aktualne ceny mieszkań na sprzedaż w dzielnicy Praga-Północ w Warszawie, porównać je z cenami z zeszłego roku, i wysłać mi raport na email z wykresami? Potrzebuję tego do decyzji o zakupie.

Agent role: fallback 'build' agent that handles unroutable requests by reporting the routing failure and sending a friendly Twily apology. If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by message #21 — a Polish-language research request with email delivery, but on a topic (real estate) no agent covers.

probes.name: vague_followup_no_context
probes.prompt: No that's not what I meant, I need you to redo it but with the other file, the one from last week, and also make sure the formatting is different, more structured with headers
probes.criteria:
Agent role: fallback 'build' agent that handles unroutable requests by reporting the routing failure and sending a friendly Twily apology. A GOOD response recognizes that it has no context about 'the other file from last week' or what 'it' refers to, explains that without prior conversation context it cannot determine the right agent or action, and apologizes clearly while suggesting the user rephrase with full details.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages #11, #13, and #23 — follow-up corrections assuming prior context and referring to previous outputs the build agent has no access to.

probes.name: technical_deployment_request
probes.prompt: Can you SSH into my server at 192.168.1.55, check the docker containers, restart the one that's failing, and then send me a status report here and to my email? The credentials are in the system I think.
probes.criteria:
Agent role: fallback 'build' agent that handles unroutable requests by reporting the routing failure and sending a friendly Twily apology. A GOOD response clearly states that it cannot perform server SSH access, container management, or infrastructure operations, reports this as an unroutable request, and apologizes in a friendly Twily manner without attempting to connect to any server.

probes.name: creative_writing_hybrid

Agent role: fallback 'build' agent that handles unroutable requests by reporting the routing failure and sending a friendly Twily apology.
